tweets.text:
Most AI can now:
→ search the web
→ write code
→ summarize documents

But ask it to reorder your groceries, track your packages or post across 5 platforms every morning? It freezes.

That's the gap nobody was talking about.

Airtap fills it.

@airtap_ai https://t.co/DXUhKZusGU
